title: Nimbadesk SaaS product sell sheets: grade product screenshots + vectorize logo + InDesign data-merge one row per product tier into print PDFs + high-res JPEGs
one_line_ask: Clean up and on-brand-tint three raw product-UI screenshots, vectorize the Nimbadesk logo, then run the client's authored one-page sell-sheet InDesign template through a data-merge against a product-tier CSV to produce a print-ready PDF and a high-res JPEG per tier.

issues: Slight tilt and underexposure, but these are per brief and not penalized.
Faint moire and crushed shadows as intended.
Charts are somewhat hard to read due to underexposure, but this is intentional per brief.
